series_metadata.series_title: Scanned documents for PISGS license or registration
series_metadata.series_description: Record series consists of all paper documents that are scanned for a PISGS license or registration. This includes all paper registration packets, supporting paper documentation that is scanned, uploaded, and electronically stored in the PISGS system/database. This includes background check information, enforcement and investigative reports, license status reports, insurance information, quarterly reports, payment receipts, and all information related to a licensee or registration record on paper or stored in the PISGS system.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Information is maintained in PISGS system as long as record is active. Once a record becomes inactive (expired, terminated, withdrawn, or revoked), record shall be retained inactive status. ; Paper: All paper documents and photos are be disposed of scanning into PISGS system
